title: Head Start Enrollment Specialist (Early Learning)
notes: Major urban district (~14K students). KCPS operates Early Learning Community Schools (Central Early Head Start at 3221 Indiana Ave, Richardson, Woodland sites) for ages 3-5 plus federally funded Head Start serving 460 students. Supt: Dr. Jennifer Collier (CEO). No dedicated 'Director of Early Childhood' surfaces publicly; Anabel Luna is publicly listed contact for Early Learning enrollment. Recommend Apollo lookup for ECE director / Head Start director by name.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: Large affluent St. Louis County district (~21K students). Herod approved by Board July 2021; previously coordinator of Rockwood ECSE & Behavior Services (since 2018), and dir special services at Wright City. MA Lindenwood, BEd Missouri Baptist. Rockwood Center for Early Childhood Ed at 17920 Manchester Rd, Wildwood. Email pattern lastnamefirstname@rsdmo.org confirmed via district org chart. Phone is direct ECE line.

title: Principal, Barfield Early Childhood Center
notes: Fastest-growing district in MO (~17K students, St. Charles County). Barfield ECC at 2025 Hanley Rd, Dardenne Prairie serves ECSE & PAT. Asst Principal Courtney Malensky. Supt Dr. Danielle Tormala. District also uses domain @wsdr4.org for some accounts; primary domain is @wentzville.k12.mo.us per ZoomInfo. Email pattern first.last@wentzville.k12.mo.us inferred from confirmed staff.

title: Director of Early Education
notes: Large North St. Louis County district (~10K students). EC dept main line (314) 824-2074; earlyed@fergflor.org for general inquiries. Herd-Luckett confirmed via LinkedIn and district org chart (FFSD 24-25). District operates Early Childhood Center; Title I and MPP classrooms.

title: Director of Walter Ambrose Family Center (Early Childhood)
notes: Affluent St. Louis County district (~4K students). Walter Ambrose Family Center at 222 W. Cedar Ave serves ages 2-5 plus PAT birth-K. Email domain split: @wgmail.org for some staff, @webster.k12.mo.us for others; Reading uses @wgmail.org per ZoomInfo/RocketReach. Dr. Cynthia Hebenstreit named interim director for 2026-27 SY (transition signal).

title: Director of Early Learning
notes: State-operated St. Louis County district (~2.7K students). Normandy Early Learning Center at 7855 Natural Bridge Rd; Dr. Lanor Payne serves as Principal/Administrator. Crystal Hunter is district-level Director Early Learning per ZoomInfo. Email pattern lastname.firstname@normandysc.org inferred from district directory. SSD partner for ECSE: Melissa Logan.

title: Director of Early Childhood Education
notes: Small affluent St. Louis County district (~800 students). Brentwood ECC at 1201 Hanley Industrial Ct serves tuition-based preschool + ECSE. Confirmed on official district staff directory; previously listed Beth Clay in older sources. Email pattern: first-initial+lastname@brentwoodmoschools.org.

title: Principal, New Trails Early Childhood
notes: South KC metro district (~8.4K students). New Trails Early Learning Center serves PreK with Title I and ECSE programs. Kristin Jones Franklin serves as Coordinator (kristin.jonesfranklin@raytownschools.org); 'Tisha Hensel coordinates PAT. Email convention first.last@raytownschools.org confirmed.

title: Director, Liggett Trail Education Center (Early Childhood)
notes: Major East KC metro district (~14K students). Liggett Trail Education Center is consolidated EC hub: ECSE, PAT, Title I Preschool, Cub Care Preschool, Early Head Start, Head Start. Johnson is BSSD alumnus (student/teacher/coach/principal). Email confirmed via ZoomInfo (g***@bssd.net pattern matches BSSD standard first-initial+lastname).

title: Principal, Parkview Elementary (PK-2 + Title I Preschool)

Supt Dr. Matt Robinson. Email domain @cameronschools.org (not @cameron.k12.mo.us as district website suggests). Email pattern first-initial+lastname.
